description: Writing exercises of the Hebrew alphabet that display the surname Meṣlīḥ/מצליח in the heading. Based on AIU IX.A.46 in this series and other writing exercises that follow this format (BL: OR 10123.6-7; JRL Series B 3647), the surname Meṣlīḥ is likely that of the student. Based on the paleography, nomenclature in these document types, and the paper it is likely that these exercises date to the 18th or 19th centuries (Date: 18th c or 19th c). MCD.
description_he: תרגילי כתיבה של האלפבית העברי עם שם המשפחה מצליח בכותרת - ככל הנראה שם התלמיד. ממאה ה-18 או ה-19.
